_metadata.description: Comprehensive source → database crosswalk for the 19 CRA T3010 datasets.
_metadata.sourceAuthority: Government of Canada Open Data Portal (open.canada.ca) — CKAN datastore_search API
_metadata.purpose: Prove every source key is either (a) mapped to a target column with a known transform, or (b) intentionally skipped. Zero silent drops allowed.
